name: Cloud Security Coverage — Wiz, Prisma Cloud, Microsoft Defender for Cloud
description: ATT&CK technique coverage provided by Wiz, Prisma Cloud (Palo Alto Networks), and Microsoft Defender for Cloud through CSPM, secrets scanning, cloud account protection, and workload security.

techniques.comment: CSPM misconfiguration detection for exploitable public-facing apps
Cloud infrastructure discovery activity detection
Cloud storage object enumeration detection
Container and resource discovery detection
Cloud service discovery detection
Software discovery log visibility in cloud workloads
Secrets scanning for credentials in files and repos
Private key exposure detection via secrets scanning
Container API credential exposure detection
Application access token theft detection
Web session cookie theft log visibility
Additional cloud credential creation detection and alerting
SSH authorized key addition detection
Cloud account anomaly detection and access governance
Elevation control mechanism abuse detection in cloud
Cloud account creation detection and policy enforcement
Cloud logging disable detection — CloudTrail/Diagnostic settings
Cloud compute infrastructure modification detection
Cloud instance creation anomaly detection
Cloud instance revert log visibility
Data transfer to external cloud account detection
Cloud storage object access and exfiltration detection
Alternate protocol exfiltration detection via cloud egress monitoring
Resource hijacking and cryptomining detection via anomalous compute usage
Endpoint denial of service log visibility

legendItems.label: Cloud Security coverage (Wiz / Prisma Cloud / Defender for Cloud)
